summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Passport Control Admin features including Edit Passport, CSV Export, and Excel/CSV Bulk Import. All backend APIs (19/19) and new frontend features tested successfully.
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (19/19 tests passed including new features)
CSV Export functionality - downloads ACF12_export.csv successfully
Bulk Import Excel/CSV API - successfully imports 2 test records
Edit Passport functionality - opens pre-filled dialog with existing data
Edit Passport dialog shows all fields (passport_no, expiry_date, names, nationality, profession)
Bulk Upload page navigation and Excel Import tab functionality
Upload zone with file format support (.xlsx, .xls, .csv)
Supported column names display for import guidance
Dashboard loads correctly with updated stats (4 groups, 1 passport)
Sidebar navigation between Dashboard and Groups
Group detail page with all action buttons (Add Passport, Export CSV, Bulk Upload)
Frontend-backend integration for new features working correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (19/19 tests passed including new CSV export, template download, and bulk import)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all new features working - edit passport, CSV export, bulk upload)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (frontend-backend communication working perfectly for new features)
